title: steriphoma paradoxum subsp. venezuelanum
intro: Steriphoma paradoxum subsp. venezuelanum, also known as the Venezulan Steriphoma, is a species of plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Steriphoma paradoxum subsp. venezuelanum include its potential to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing, as well as its ability to treat various infections and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including eczema, acne, and fungal infections.
